Description: Developed Generative AI and chatbot applications using LangChain, LangGraph, and LLMs.
Built RAG-based solutions with vector databases for intelligent document retrieval and question answering.
Designed AI-powered workflows and agentic AI systems for business process automation.
Developed scalable backend APIs using Python and FastAPI for AI applications.
Researched and adopted new AI technologies to improve application capabilities and efficiency.
Collected, labeled, and analyzed fruit quality data based on physical characteristics and ripeness indicators to build datasets for Machine Learning model development.
Developed and trained supervised Machine Learning models using Python and Scikit-learn for automated fruit ripeness classification and quality assessment.
Performed data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model optimization to improve prediction accuracy and model reliability.
Automated data processing and reporting workflows using Python to support analysis, monitoring, and operational decision-making.
Collaborated with Computer Vision teams to integrate Machine Learning models into real-time image processing and fruit inspection systems.
Deployed AI-based solutions in production environments for automated quality control, enabling real-time classification using camera-based input systems.
Generated reports to support data-driven decision-making for product teams.
